entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to extend Metadata without own SEGW Service?

entry.title: Re: Manage Substitution/Validation Rules – Journal Entries: A Guide to Business Contexts and Rules
entry.content:
Hi Ciara,

I only see a limited number of substitution fields available for journal entry item business context. I would like to make a substitution for the coding block. Is there a possibility to get more fields in the target fields.

We are on S4HANA on-premise version 2023. 

Best regards,
Marcel

entry.title: Re: Extending Decimal Places for Currency Amounts in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Ernesto,

Is it correct that SAP set the currency decimals according to ISO 4217, is there any SAP note referring to this?

entry.title: Re: How to Use Custom Fields in Sales Document BAPIs
entry.content:
Hi @krishna_ABAP ,
I just tested in our system and it was working as expected with the following coding:

Maybe you missed to add the sales order number to the variable lr_item_ext->key ?

 

REPORT zsd_bapi_extensibility.

DATA lo_bapi_mapping TYPE REF TO if_cfd_bapi_mapping.
DATA lt_item         TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapisditm.
DATA lt_itemx        TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapisditmx.
DATA lr_header_ext   TYPE REF TO bape_sdsalesdoc.
DATA lr_item_ext     TYPE REF TO bape_sdsalesdocitem.
DATA lt_item_ext     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bape_sdsalesdocitem.
DATA lt_bapiparex    TYPE bapiparextab.
DATA lt_return       TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapiret2.
DATA ls_order_header_inx TYPE bapisdh1x.


CLEAR ls_order_header_inx.
ls_order_header_inx-updateflag = 'U'.

" Fill header custom fields
CREATE DATA lr_header_ext.
lr_header_ext->data-yy1_test_head_text_sdh = 'Hell2'.
lr_header_ext->datax-yy1_test_head_text_sdh = 'X'.

" Do header custom fields mapping
lo_bapi_mapping = cl_cfd_bapi_mapping=>get_instance( ).

TRY.
    lo_bapi_mapping->map_to_bapiparex_single( EXPORTING ir_source_structure = lr_header_ext
                                              CHANGING  ct_bapiparex        = lt_bapiparex ).
  CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping INTO DATA(lx_cfd_bapi_mapping_error).

ENDTRY.

" Fill Item Fields
" You cannot fill item custom fields here!
lt_item  = VALUE #( ( itm_number = '000010' )
                    ( itm_number = '000020' ) ).
lt_itemx = VALUE #( ( updateflag = 'I' itm_number = '000010' )
                    ( updateflag = 'I' itm_number = '000020' ) ).

" Fill item custom fields
CREATE DATA lr_item_ext.
lr_item_ext->data-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'TESTY'.
lr_item_ext->datax-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'X'.
lr_item_ext->key = '0000022600000010'.
INSERT lr_item_ext->* INTO TABLE lt_item_ext.

CREATE DATA lr_item_ext.
lr_item_ext->data-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'TESTX'.
lr_item_ext->datax-yy1_test_item_text_sdi = 'X'.
lr_item_ext->key = '0000022600000020'.
INSERT lr_item_ext->* INTO TABLE lt_item_ext.

" Do item custom fields mapping
GET REFERENCE OF lt_item_ext INTO DATA(ltr_item_ext).

TRY.
    lo_bapi_mapping->map_to_bapiparex_multi( EXPORTING ir_source_table = ltr_item_ext
                                             CHANGING  ct_bapiparex    = lt_bapiparex ).
  CATCH cx_cfd_bapi_mapping INTO lx_cfd_bapi_mapping_error.

ENDTRY.

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING
    salesdocument    = '0000022600'
    order_header_inx = ls_order_header_inx
  TABLES
    return           = lt_return
    order_item_in    = lt_item
    order_item_inx   = lt_itemx
    extensionin      = lt_bapiparex.

" Commit Work
CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'.

 

If it is not working for you, please post your coding here.
best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to have a monthly timesheet that is no...
entry.content:
Hello Brandon,

yes, this is correct for the time being. However, the team works already on allowing different monthly time sheets than based on the calendar month. Your customers use case would be able to be covered. So, watch the release rollout sessions for H1 carefully. But at this point in time I can give no guarantees if they can finish developments cause we have got currently lots on the plate. But chances are good and the path is set.

Best regards

Volker

entry.title: Re: XI: RFC or ABAP Proxy ? ....ABAP Proxies with attachments
entry.content:
Dears,

we also have a requirement where in soap response from cloud we're getting attachments which we can see in srt_util response multipart but code is only reading the xml content. we referred  @ketann post above but still no luck could please any one help me out.

IF wa_yhrt_wps_conf-sender = 'BSK'.

  TRY.
      CREATE OBJECT prxy_bsk_wps_out
        EXPORTING
          logical_port_name = 'LP_t'.

      CALL METHOD prxy_bsk_wps_out->si_wps_mq_out_sync
        EXPORTING
          output = it_wps_request
        IMPORTING
          input  = it_wps_response.

      COMMIT WORK.

      DATA: msgid_prot     TYPE REF TO if_wsprotocol_message_id,
            lo_clientproxy TYPE REF TO zwps_co_si_wps_mq_out_sync,
            msgguid        TYPE sxmsmguid,
            att_prot       TYPE REF TO if_wsprotocol_attachments,
            atts           TYPE prx_attach.


      FIELD-SYMBOLS:<att>           TYPE REF TO if_ai_attachment.
      CREATE OBJECT lo_clientproxy
        EXPORTING
          logical_port_name = 'LP_t'.

      msgid_prot     ?= lo_clientproxy->get_protocol( if_wsprotocol=>message_id ).
      msgguid = msgid_prot->get_message_id( ).

*get attchment data of response
      att_prot ?= lo_clientproxy->get_protocol( if_wsprotocol=>attachments ).
      atts = att_prot->get_attachments( ).

      READ TABLE atts ASSIGNING <att> INDEX 1.
      IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
*Get attachment content from response
        xi_attachment-content = <att>->get_binary_data( ).
*Get filename
        filename = <att>->get_document_name( ).
* Get extension
        mime_type = <att>->get_content_type( ).

        CALL FUNCTION 'sdok_file_name_extension_get'
          EXPORTING
            mimetype  = mime_type
          IMPORTING
            extension = extension.
*Build filename.extension
        CONCATENATE filename '.' extension INTO xi_attachment-filename.

        COMMIT WORK.
      ENDIF.

      CREATE OBJECT lo_fault.
    CATCH cx_ai_system_fault INTO lo_fault.
      WRITE 😕 lo_fault->errortext.
  ENDTRY.

ELSE.

ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: Cannot able to access the Latest candidate workbench...
entry.content:
Dear Monika, this is coming too late for you, but for anybody else stumbling across this question for us the following worked:
Open Job Application template -> Change something in the field mentioned in the error (such as adding a description) -> Publish again.

entry.title: Re: Usage and differences between MRS , RSH and FSM

entry.title: Re: Strange SELECT behaviour
entry.content:
Sometimes after you have stared at something for hours nothing pops up until you ask for help

(SELECT SUM(A_Purchase_Ledger.Credit)- SUM(A_Purchase_Ledger.Debit)FROM A_Purchase_Ledger WHERE A_Purchase_Ledger.Supplier_ID = SupplierID) as 'TotalBalance'

entry.title: Re: Questions about single and multi tenant BTP deployment
entry.content: If I understand you correctly i can do the following.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Client 8.00
entry.content:
Hi Mathias, please check the following option:

In %programdata%\SAP\NWBC\NwbcOptions.xml die SingleOption ShowFavoriteMenu=false setzen.

<NwbcOptions>
<SingleOptions>
<ShowFavoriteMenu>false</ShowFavoriteMenu>
</SingleOptions>
</NwbcOptions>

 

Gib bitte eine Meldung auf, wenn es nicht klappen sollte: BC-FES-BUS-DSK

 

Und schon mal Frohe Feiertag und einen guten Start ins Neue Jahr zusammen mit dem Business Client 🙂

Gruß,

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Screen exits in HUPAST
entry.content:
Hello @lat_gmbh,

I have the same problem mentionned above.

I try to solve it with the badi BADI_HU_PACKING_ALWD and inside use of 2 FM SERIAL_LISTE_HU and V51P_XVEPO_YVEPO_UPDATE

But i have problem to make the vepo update because the line in VEPO is not created again and the FM V51P_XVEPO_YVEPO_UPDATE return me "error line in VEPO doesn't exist"

Can you give me the code you put in the badi ? I don't understand how to update vepo at this moment...

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to detect from a Custom Widget that I am in the story edit / design mode?
entry.content:
I want certain functionalities of my custom widget to be only available while in edit mode in the story design.

Looking at the console, it seems that there should be a way to detect it.

How can I detect that I am in the edit mode through my widget's source code?

entry.title: Change Sender E-Mail address for po approval notification workflow
entry.content:
Hey all,

We have currently created a flexible workflow in SAP Cloud where the approver receives a notification from SAP that a PO is ready for approval. (Essentially, the deadline is set to 0 minutes so that the email is sent out immediately.) This email is sent with the sender address configured in CBC under 'Define Default Email Sender Address for Email Outbound,' which is essentially the default email address of our system.

Now the question: Is it possible to change the sender email address specifically just for this workflow, i.e., for the PO approval notifications only?

Thank you in advance

did you have a look at Releasing Development Objects?

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: Adobe Document Services on SLES 15 SP6 non latin char...
entry.content:
Info from SAP:

"To resolve the issue, please refer to SAP Note 3549075, and apply ADS patch.Additional Info: Fix will be available from ADS NW750 SP26 (and onwards). For SP30 and SP31, patch is currently available. For SP26 to SP29, it is in ‘In process’ status."

entry.title: Re: SAP Practice
entry.content:
Dear @Muhammad_Zain 

Really appreciate your effort and confidence to have certification SAP  C_TS4FI_2023 in SAP S/4HANA Finance  . Its seems good to practice before final examination but for that you have to arrange the tenant from your side or either you have purchase from SAP Portal  - https://www.sap.com/training-certification/learning-hub.html .

Thanks
Harvind Narayan

entry.title: Re: Questions about single and multi tenant BTP deployment
entry.content: So If I understand you correctly I can create two dev spaces on the same sub account and give each space 500 megs of the single 1 gig quota. Then I deploy the production version of the App on one dev space and the test/development version of the app on the second space. I guess I will still have to contantly preserve changes in both when it comes to for example destinations since destinations are not per dev space but it does save me the trouble of having to rename many different values in the app's code and configuration files?

entry.title: SAC Add dimensions as properties
entry.content:
Hello,

In SAC Help I have found these statements:

Other Enhancements

Besides the enhancements above-mentioned, the new flexible modeling approach adds the following functionalities:
  • Add dimensions as properties to single column dimensions.
  • Enable or disable planning capabilities at any time in time.

Get Started with Flexible Modeling | SAP Help Portal

I cannot find how to use dimensions as properties for another dimension.

Also, I can disable planning capabilities in one model with data, but it's disabled for another model. Both are new type with measures.

Can you clarify it, please?

Br, Oleksandr

entry.title: Migrate Person via Migrate your Data
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have been trying for some time now to migrate contact persons using the “Migrate your Data” app.

However, I always get the following message:
Assignment of BP grouping 0001 to vendor account group not available
(CNV_DMC_SIN 555)

However, this is only one contact person, so I shouldn't actually need an account group.

My plan was to migrate the contact persons via the “General data” sheet and then the customers and vendors.

Can anyone help me with this?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: Questions about single and multi tenant BTP deployment
entry.content: yes, your understanding is correct. You have to find the right approach to manage and transport configuration with this setup which works for you. If I'm not mistaken e.g. the destination service supports also space level of instance creation. I'm not an expert with the service but the place to start is the discovery center: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/destination?service_plan=lite&region=all&commercialModel=btpea&tab=

entry.title: Aspect Oriented Programming in Spring and SAP Commerce
entry.content:
1. Introduction

In the world of enterprise software, enhancing maintainability and scalability is the key. This is especially true for SAP Commerce, where customization often means diving deep into the architecture. One powerful yet underutilized feature in the Spring Framework, integral to SAP Commerce, is Aspect-Oriented Programming (AOP).

In this blog, we’ll explore what AOP is, why it’s useful, and how you can use it in SAP Commerce. We’ll also walk through a real-world scenario where AOP saved the day.

What is AOP?

Aspect-Oriented Programming (AOP) is a programming paradigm that allows you to separate cross-cutting concerns (like logging, security, and transaction management) from your business logic.

Without AOP, developers often scatter code for these concerns across multiple layers, leading to duplication and less maintainable solutions. AOP helps centralize these concerns into aspects, making your code cleaner and easier to manage.

 

2. Key Concepts of AOP

 Aspect

An aspect is a piece of code designed to handle repetitive tasks—things like logging, security checks, or performance tracking—that affect multiple parts of an application. Instead of scattering these tasks across the system, you define them in one place (the aspect).

For example, if you want to log every time a price is calculated, you don’t need to manually add logging code to every pricing-related method. You define an aspect to handle all logging for you, automatically and consistently.

Join Point

A join point is any point in your application where a specific action takes place, like when a method is called or an object is created. In AOP, these are the opportunities for your aspect to step in and do its job.

For example, every time a customer places an order, that’s a join point. It’s a moment where you might want to track the action (logging), check user permissions (security), or monitor performance (profiling).

Advice

Advice is what the aspect actually does at the join point. It’s the specific instruction or action triggered when a condition is met. Think of advice as the logic that answers: “What should happen at this join point?”

For example:

  • Before Advice: Check if the user is authorized before they access a service.
  • After Advice: Log the outcome of a transaction after it’s processed.
  • Around Advice: Measure how long a method takes by wrapping logic before and after its execution.

Pointcut

A pointcut is the filter that tells your aspect when and where to act. It defines the criteria for selecting join points.

For example, if you only want to log price calculations, you create a pointcut that targets methods in your pricing service, like getPrice(). This ensures your advice runs exactly where it’s needed—and nowhere else.

Weaving

Weaving is the process of connecting your aspects with the main codebase. It’s like stitching a patch onto fabric, seamlessly embedding your cross-cutting concerns into the core functionality.

In Spring, this weaving happens automatically at runtime using proxies. This means you can inject additional behavior without permanently altering your original code.

 

Why Use AOP in SAP Commerce?

SAP Commerce, built on the Spring Framework, is a highly extensible platform, but its complexity can lead to challenges:

  • Logging: You may want detailed logging for specific services without altering their code.
  • Performance Monitoring: Track method execution times for optimization.
  • Security: Enforce security checks for sensitive operations.
  • Special use cases: Situations where traditional approach can’t be used.

AOP allows you to address these scenarios with minimal impact on your core logic, keeping customizations modular and maintainable.

 

3. Use case

One practical scenario where AOP shines is when you need to override or modify functionality in an SAP Commerce method without directly altering its code. Here’s an example from my experience: customizing the email-sending behavior of a CronJob.

The challenge arose when the customer switched their email service provider, necessitating changes in the cronjob functionality. However, the CronJob class in SAP Commerce is a Jalo class, not a bean service, making it problematic to override in a way that would apply the new implementation to all previously created CronJobs. In this scenario, Aspect-Oriented Programming (AOP) can be utilized to handle the requirement more easily and clearly from a code perspective

The first step was to find the specific method in the CronJob class responsible for sending emails and creating an aspect class.

In the CronJobAspect class we can configure the Pointcut, so the method which will be intercepted by AOP, method which will be called and when it will be called – before, after or instead of the original method.

It can look like this and in this case, we call the new method instead of the original one:

@Aspect

public class CronJobAspect {

    @Autowired

    CustomCronJobEmailService cronjobEmailService;

    @Pointcut("execution(* de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.CronJob.sendEmail(..))")

    public void cronjobEmailSendingPointcut(){}//pointcut name

    @Around("cronjobEmailSendingPointcut()")//applying pointcut

    public void sendEmailWithCronJobStatus(JoinPoint jp) throws EmailException{...}

}

It’s also possible to configure that in one annotation, without special one for the pointcut, like this:

@Around("execution(* de.hybris.platform.cronjob.jalo.CronJob.sendEmail(..))")

public void sendEmailWithCronJobStatus(JoinPoint jp) throws EmailException

 

4. Conclusion

Aspect-Oriented Programming can be a game-changer for SAP Commerce developers seeking clean, modular solutions to common challenges. Whether you’re logging, monitoring, or adding custom business logic, AOP keeps your codebase maintainable.

It's worth considering the capabilities that AOP offers and keeping them in mind when searching for solutions to your problems.

entry.title: Re: SAP BUILD - Business solution in html5 app is differe...
entry.content: Delete the bad destination.

entry.title: Re: Identity Provisioning not creating users after a read/sync no errors
entry.content: @eleonakthat indeed would be incorrect: Work Zone standard edition is used as a target system in IPS for provisioning role mappings into its own user store (which doesn't have an UI, by the way). If you want to transfer users and groups to your custom identity provider, you must configure this one as a target system in the IPS specifically (e.g. with the Local Identity Directory type).

entry.title: Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order API - SAP BTP Usage
entry.content:
While following the process for consuming API Hub v4 OData services in BTP ABAP - Unable to import the Warehouse Outbound Delivery Order .edmx to our Cloud BTP ABAP environment:

Error while parsing an xml stream 'failed to change codepage'.

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_WAREHOUSEOUTBDELIVERYORDER_0001/overview

 

A common pattern I am seeing and potential cause for working vs. non-working service imports, seems to be

"Edmx Version 1.0" (works)

Edmx Version 4.0 (failed to change codepage error).

 

 

 

 

 

__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Download Process Flows SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Dear Community,
Is there a way to download the list of Process Flows, Performance Indicators and Correction Recommedndations in the End-to-End Processes section of SAP Signavio Process Insights? I can only find a download option for the Innovation Recommendations. In the Transformation Planning area, I also have the option of downloading the process flows, among other things. However, these are not related to end-to-end processes. But if I understand correctly, the processes in the ‘End-to-End Processes’ and ‘Transformation Planning’ areas are otherwise identical, right? Only the way they are set up/displayed is different, right? Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Employee History Salary Field for Hourly P...
entry.content:
Thank you @xavierlegarrec  for the quick response and suggestion!

I tested the suggestion of creating a new pay component group, but it still shows as 0.

My only explanation for this issue is that the annualization logic between EC and Variable Pay may differ. Although we can view the annualization of the pay component in EC, this value is not stored there (2080171 - Employee Pay Group Sums do not retrieve any data when selected in Ad Hoc Reports - Employee Central). As a result, when we map a salary field to the sum of a pay component group, the value is recalculated in Variable Pay.

In EC, the annualization of non-hourly pay components is performed by multiplying by the annualization factor based on the frequency. For hourly pay components, the annualization factor is 0. When the annualization factor is 0, EC assumes the pay component is hourly and, instead of using the annualization factor, it multiplies by the Standard Weekly Hours and the Weeks per year (2162127 - Compensation Information: Pay Component Group Calculations).

What I believe is happening in Variable Pay is that the annualization is always calculated by multiplying the pay component by the annualization factor, even if it is set to 0. In contrast, in EC, when the annualization factor is 0, it recognizes the pay component as hourly and multiplies by the weekly hours and the weeks in the year.

However, I can't find any information from SAP indicating that there is a limitation on using hourly pay components in VarPay.

entry.title: Re: The business partner with guid xxxxxxxxxxxx doesn't exist
entry.content: Hi Neeraj, this link is not working, Could you please let know - how to avoid this error

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi, @PrasadMungekar. Yes, to extend the validity of your certifications, you need to have a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription to take the assessment. You have a validity of 12 months from the day you passed your certification on August and for the one before April it is March 31, 2025, so I hope for you that you find a new employer within that time so that this employer can provide you with an SAP Learning Hub license. 

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Convert Excel Data into a json payload structure in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: I am reading an excel sheet and extracting data in an automation. After extracting the data, I want to convert it into a payload json structure. What are the available options for doing so?

entry.title: IDT Universe best practices : Better to have many derived tables or one long SQL script ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

My universe is taking a long time to load. Currently I'm using a long SQL script (more than 17.000 caracters) that includes temporary tables. 

I'm wondering if replacing those temporary tables with derived tables might improve performance.

Has anyone encountered a similar situation or tried this approach ? 

Thanks in advance !

entry.title: Re: Celebrating 2 Years of the Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I have been working in software industry for approx 22 years and got opportunity to handle 5million transactions per day. So, many things I had been doing by intuition, like data anomaly, trends, descriptive analysis. 

But " Getting Started with Data Science" has given a very interesting and formal handling of data mining and predictions models. I am interested in exploring more in this area and would like to contribute in this area. Kindly consider to give certification voucher and allow me to do more in this area.

Regards,

Fakhir Anwar.

entry.title: Re: Setup activity missing for a sub-operation in PDS |CU...
entry.content: Hi, Thank you Rupesh for the detailed explanation.

entry.title: Re: Adding headers during Fiori Deployment
entry.content:
Hi.
For deployment purposes, appending additional headers is not supported.

If I've read the comments correctly, here are some improvements you can make; Please refer to the following guide for more info;

https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/ux-ui5-tooling

Create a .env file in the root of your SAPUI5 project and append the following content;

XYZ_USER=myusername
XYZ_PASSWORD=mypassword

Next, update your ui5-deploy.yaml as follows where you are appending the credentials node;

configuration:
  yes: true
  failfast: true
  target:
    url: https://XYZ.sap-system.corp:44311
    client: 200 
  credentials:
    username: env:XYZ_USER
    password: env:XYZ_PASSWORD

Now, when you run npm run deploy it will pickup the env variables configured with your credentials.

Additionally, if you are using a CI/CD pipeline, you can update the ui5-deploy.yaml to bypass the Yes confirmation prompt and fail immediately if any of the requests fails. A typical scenario is where authentication might fail and you want to disable the credentials prompts from being shown again.

If you want to create TR on the fly during each deployment task, then append the REPLACE_WITH_TRANSPORT bookmark to your app configuration in ui5-deploy.yaml;

app:
  name: /TEST/SAMPLE_APP
  package: /TEST/UPLOAD
  transport: REPLACE_WITH_TRANSPORT

FYI, using the TR REPLACE_WITH_TRANSPORT for undeployment works as well, for example, when you run npm run undeploy.
To go a step further, you can also generate CLI commands for your CI/CD pipeline;
Sample CLI flow;

npx fiori deploy --url https://your-env.hana.ondemand.com --name 'SAMPLE_APP' --package 'MY_PACKAGE' --transport 'REPLACE_WITH_TRANSPORT' --archive-path 'archive.zip' --username 'env:XYZ_USER' --pasword 'my-client-secret' --noConfig --failfast --yes

You can manipulate these CLI params to suit your needs.
John

entry.title: Re: SAP instance reached state SHUTDOWN after having stat...
entry.content: Please check sap note 3392400 and 2441956

entry.title: How to create Fiori Tracker:, tiles usage and User monitoring for SAP Fiori launchpad?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

I have followed Creat a cap  to create CAP and Fiori App, and I want now to create a fiori tracker to get statistics, who is using which apps and how long and more Details. I found some blogs such as Blog and in Github but they are not from scratch, difficult for me. I need to do this from scratch step by step to add this to my CAP and Fiori App, maybe someone know a blog which can help. Other question, do I need to integrate ABAP for my task?

 

Thank you.

Mahmood

entry.title: Learn to integrate SAP Subscription Billing with both SAP and non-SAP systems via events and APIs
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Integrating Systems with SAP Subscription Billing Using Events and APIs learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey will guide you through events and APIs that orchestrate the integration of systems within SAP Subscription Billing.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to identify the different options for using APIs and events to manage the synchronization of billing data; gain knowledge about representational state transfer APIs, or REST APIs, and the variety of REST API methods that provide unique rules for interacting with system resources and services; use REST client tools to test and manage APIs for access rights and cancelling subscriptions; and effectively manage usage APIs to report,

Prerequisites

  • Recommended Applying SAP Subscription Billing

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Integration of a Process Error 500
entry.content:
I wanted to send a short E-Mail with the status of an object from my app and was trying to use a process from Process Automation for that.
To learn how to do that, I tried following these tutorials:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/codejam-07-connect-app-process..html
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8RVo3-h2n-I

I created a Service Key and a Destination as it was described in the tutorials with the name "sap_process_automation_service_user_access" and set URL, Client ID, Client Secret and Token Service URL the way the tutorial said.
URL: API from Service key
Client ID and Client Secret: Client ID and Client Secret from Service Key
Token Service URL: URL/oauth/token
When I press Check Connection it says that the Connection is established (Response: 401).

The Process was also released, deployed and published to Library and it is being displayed in the Integrations Tab of my App in "SAP Build Library.

However, if I then click on any of the Processes it loads for a while and then says "something went wrong"

And in the console it throws 3 Response Errors with the Status Code 500

 

I have tried this on different days, in different browsers and on different systems. I set up the Subscriptions from the ground up and tried it again, I deleted and recreated the destination and service keys multiple times, but nothing of that has helped.
I also thought that maybe it was because the Destinations tab in the Control Tower was empty and added my destination in there as well and I have tried to use the sample process and App provided by the Youtube Tutorial, but even then the same error occured.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict employees from recording timesheet af...
entry.content: @Aratrika_Bardhan: you can use the time recording admissibility object. You can either use the "old" function to define the admissibiilty periods in weeks, or you can fill a table in the newer "retroactiv change restriction" section where you can enter a list of dates. The "effective as of" date a date in your time sheet period and the "no changes before" field can then be entered with a calendar date as well. With this you can align your time sheet periods to the payroll period for example.

entry.title: SAP Signavio Language of Folders
entry.content:
Hello Community 🙂 
I am working on a Signavio Setup where we are working with two languages, english and german. We already changed the default language of the workspace to german, but we anyways also need the content additionally in english. We therefore have given the content and the folder english and german names.

You can see here a Folder and a BPMN file:

The language you see is in german, even though my personal language is english:

 

Here you can see both fields are maintained:

 

So my question is, how can I change the language of an individual User in Process Manager to see the english fields in the navigational explorer of the Process Manager, while the overall workspace default language is german?

entry.title: Supplier Enablement Manage Vendors
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I wanted to understand which user permissions in SAP Business Network gives access to Manage Vendors under the Supplier Enablement Tab. Is this option only available in Production instance and cannot be accessed in test mode? Is this only available for one user in the organization (Account Administrator?). 

I have assigned myself the below user permissions related to Supplier Enablement in Business Network, but still i don't see the Manage Vendors Option in Business Network. can someone please confirm if you have any experience or have experienced the similar issue and were able to resolve this?

 

Supplier Enablement Program Administrator 

Supplier Enablement Task Management

Supplier Enablement Configuration

Supplier Enablement Program Administrator

Thanks,
Velu

but not able to purchase because the add basket option is not coming up.
This issue is coming up for India only, for other region the add basket option is visible.

Is any one know why this issue is coming?
please give if any other way to apply for certification in India region.

Thanks for reply!

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to have a monthly timesheet that is no...
entry.content: Thanks for confirming @Volker_Ruof. I'll be watching the release closely.

entry.title: Re: Operating a multi-tenant solution on BTP CF - 1 GB Ru...
entry.content: Hello Jreimann, let me try to answer the question again :-). If the space quota limit for a resource exceeds the org quota limit, the org quota limit applies as documented BTP help portal https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/create-space-quota-plans. If you exceed the quota you won't be able to deploy your application and will get an error during deployment like " Pushing app ... to org ... / space ... as ... For application '...': Routes quota exceeded for organization '...'. FAILED". The Cloud Foundry Runtime price is calculated based on GB memory (https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/serviceCatalog/cloud-foundry-runtime?region=all&tab=service_plan) that is why the usage analysis doesn't include this information. Regarding the UI behaviour for space quota management I will contact our UI team and provide the feedback. Thank you for that and I hope this answers your questions.

entry.title: Re: DM - Data sources for Dashboards
entry.content:
Hello @it10 ,
No, that´s currently not possible.
Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content:
Hi @thomas_beck 

i did that as you said butit appear an error, but appeared the following error:

 

This is my code:

MEMBERSET[d/Date]=%TargetMonth%
DATA([d/Measures] = "VB", [d/Date] = %TargetMonth%) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "VB", [d/Date] = %SourceMonth%, [d/Version] = %SourceVersion%) * ( RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "perce_aumento_VB", [d/Version] = "public.Actual", [d/Date] = "202401") + 1 )

Configuration of the parameter:

entry.title: Creating custom names for legal entities and locations to be used in Success Factors Onboarding.
entry.content:
In this article we will be looking at how you can send custom names for legal entities or locations in emails in Success Factors Onboarding.

If you want to send an email to the candidate welcoming them to a specific company then you can pull in the name of the legal entity, in this case ‘Track LLC’.  However, this is not the name of the operating company, let’s say they want to communicate to candidate as ‘Track & Field Marketing’.  How can this be achieved?

Step 1

You add in a custom field onto the legal entity table called ‘ONB Name’, this is a text field and you store the custom name, in this case ‘Track & Field Marketing’.

Step 2

Create custom email token in ‘Manage Document Template Mapping’ and map this to jobinformation.legalentity.ONB Name

Step 3

Insert the custom email token into the correct email template.

This will now send the email with the custom name.

This solution can be very useful for retail where you may need to be more specific with the location names.    Here is an example, London is the name of the Location but we would like to be more detailed.  The solution is the same as above but uses the location object.

entry.title: Enhanced Notifications for SAP Central Business Configuration 2409 FD2 − Troubleshooting Guide
entry.content:
With the latest release of SAP Central Business Configuration (2409 FD2), the Notifications area was enhanced. The changes are listed as usual in the What’s New Viewer on the SAP Help Portal. Here's further information about troubleshooting.

Missing Notifications

Is the system not showing the notifications for your user? Do you see just one generic message but expect more notifications based on the latest project status?

Please check the roles assigned to your user and the list of projects you are part of. Only users that have a valid email address replicated to SAP Central Business Configuration and are assigned to at least one project team are able to see the Notifications in the shell bar. In addition, users with the Program Manager role, which gives access to all projects, can see them, too.

In case you see only the following notification message under the bell icon, you need to check certain values in your system as the problem may impact multiple users in your system:

      

Screenshot of the Missing Email notification message

By choosing this notification, you're pointed to the SAP Note 3544368 − Notifications are not visible in shell bar after SAP Central Business Configuration 2409 FD2 release.

Here are the step-by-step instructions to check and solve the problem as described in the article.

 

Step 1: Check the User Assignment to Projects

We'll use the following data in our example:

  • Business user: Notification Bell
  • Login name: NOBEL

Our user is assigned to the project as Key User and Program Manager:

                                                            Screenshot of the Team user list

The user group / role authorization prerequisite is met for our user so this is the expected setup. In case you're not assigned to a project, please contact your Program Manager or Project Manager to adjust your roles and assign you as a member to an existing project.

 

Step 2: Check the User Settings to Validate Email Address Replication 

If you've validated the previous step but still see the same notification message, you need to check the User Account details from the shell bar: Profile > User Settings > User Account

                                     

                                                            Screenshot of the User Account settings 

The User Settings should highlight the missing email address for the user as this is the expected behavior for the Missing Email notification to be shown to the user.

 

Step 3: Check the Settings in the SAP Cloud Identity Services System for User Replication 

As the source of the problem is identified, you need to contact your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant administrator to validate the current user replication settings that cause the email address to be missing for your user.

The usage of the email address was optional for SAP Central Business Configuration as the user access relies on the Subject Name Identifier attribute being configured in SAP Cloud Identity Services as Login Name. 

Screenshot of the Subject Name Identifier application screen

The replication of the email address depends on the transformations used to map the user attributes from the data model of the source system to the data model of the target system for SAP Central Business Configuration in the SAP Cloud Identity Services − Identity Provisioning tenant.

In our example, we'll check our target CBC - my_company_cbc_system - target and compare the Transformations with the latest values published in the Identity Provisioning Service page on the SAP Help Portal: Target Systems > SAP Central Business Configuration

Screenshot of the Transformations target system screen

Screenshot of the latest Transformations target documentation

The values highlighted are responsible for the identification, mapping, and replication of the user email address form the source to the target system and are missing in our environment as this stored the old default transformations mappings. 

 

Step 4: Update the Settings in the SAP Cloud Identity Services System

Having identified the root cause in the previous step, we need to fix the target transformations and add the missing values. You can copy the values from the SAP Help Portal page or the SAP Note and insert them in the target transformations entry active in your system.

In our example, we'll update the CBC - my_company_cbc_system - target with the following lines related to the User Mappings section:

            {
                "sourcePath": "$.emails",
                "preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true,
                "targetPath": "$.emails"
            },
            {
                "targetPath": "$.emails[0].primary",
                "condition": "$.emails[?(@.primary == true)].value == []",
                "constant": true
            },

For more information on how to edit the file, see the Manage Transformations page on SAP Help Portal.

The updated values will now include the necessary fields required to show notifications to the user in SAP Central Business Configuration:

Screenshot of the updated Transformations target system screen

 

Step 5: Refresh the User Settings in the SAP Central Business Configuration System

With the user mapping transformations updated, it's time to send the data to the SAP Central Business Configuration system. Changes made will be applicable to all users that have relevant roles assigned, so in case you have more than one user reporting the missing notification message, this update will solve the problem for all users.

Please perform a normal user provisioning job as documented in the Running Jobs for User Provisioning  page on the SAP Help Portal by selecting the relevant source system from your source list. In our example, this is called IAS for-my_company_cbc_system - source:

Screenshot of the source system for user provisioning

Once the job has run successfully, the problem should be solved and we can validate the results in the SAP Central Business Configuration system.

 

Step 6: Check and Confirm the Results in the SAP Central Business Configuration System

From here, we'll repeat the validation of the User Settings from step 2. Our sample business user Notification Bell now has a visible email address, which should match the value maintained for the user in the SAP Cloud Identity Services system: your_user@yourcompany.com

Screenshot of the updated User Account settings

Under the bell icon, we'll now see the full list of notifications raised for the user in the system:

Screenshot of the updated notification message box

The number of notifications and types will depend on the actual processes and number of projects available in your system.

 

Summary

In this blog, we've taken a step-by-step approach for the potential problems that may require your attention when you're using the enhanced notifications for the SAP Central Business Configuration 2409 FD2 release.

By providing step-by-step troubleshooting and practical examples, we hope that we could guide you through this process as seamlessly as possible so that you can benefit from the updated feature and prepare yourself for future improvements.

Please feel free to ask any further question that you have related to this topic here or in the What’s New in SAP Central Business Configuration 2409 FD2 blog where the feature was introduced. Make sure to follow the SAP Central Business Configuration tag or follow this dedicated blog collection to stay up to date with the latest blog posts.

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @JENISH,
It really depends on what changes you are talking about. Some transactional order changes in DM are synchronized back to ERP, like Order Release (RMES) status and Operation Schedule changes in REO, for example. See Production Order Integration and Scheduling Options for more details. Master data changes in DM are not transferred back to ERP, as in general ERP is the master for master data objects and DM the slave.
Br, Manoel

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.4: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
entry.content:
With immediate effect, the final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.4 is now available. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is based on the technical product SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

To access the Final What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer.

For further formats and languages of the What's New information, as well as pre-filtered views, please use the following SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page.

In addition, the final Product Assistance (aka Application Help) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.4 is available. Please use the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Help Portal page to access the Product Assistance in multiple languages.

For you as a customers, we recommend to also use the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.4 will be available in RASD within the next few days. A valid Customer S-user ID is required for login. We recommend to use RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you as a customer.

You can use the commenting feature for What’s New. With this feature, authors can evaluate your feedback and incorporate it into the documentation, if needed. We hope that by opening this channel of communication, we can learn how to further improve our What’s New content for you. 

To use this feature, you need to be logged into the Help Portal. The feature will only be available in the English version of the documents. To learn more about how the feedback process works in SAP Help Portal, see Giving Documentation Feedback.

entry.title: Display customer list standard app new column addition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement in which we need to add a new column (PAN) in the table inside Display Customer List.

I have tried to create a adaptation project on SAP BAS. I was unable to add a new column using the SAPUI5 adaptation editor. 

Fiori App reference library: "Display Customer List application"

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps(%27F2640%27)/S23OP

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

Avishek

entry.title: Re: A WT delimited, and,first payroll after Rehire errore...
entry.content:
You will need to modify the earliest master data change date and master date for change to bonus on the Payroll Status infotype to align with the rehire action - this will mean that the earlier changes are not taken into account.

You can also consider changing the earliest retroactive change date so backdated changes won't be considered going forward should they subsequently appear.

Lastly, a review of if any payments/deductions against the previous employment should be undertaken and either handled via an offline process, or brought into the current employment period.

entry.title: SAP certification subscription for an individual
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

As an individual, I want to purchase the Learning HUB subscription. I want to schedule my exam for SAP Financial Accounting.

what is the procedure to purchase the subscription as an individual, please need your support and guidance.

Is it possible in Saudi Arabia especially, and my S-user ID is from HCL Tech.

 

Regards,
Babu.

Certification SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management

entry.title: Re: Table control: column visible length is zero

I was having the same situation were the length of column 'Requisitioner' in PO was set to zero and field grayed-out, after using the 'Delete' option in 'Edit system settings' screen it went back to normal.

Thank you!

entry.title: Unable to delete PSA - Control cycle WM Production Supply (Release order part) SAP R3
entry.content:
Hello,

 I`m trying to delete unused PSA`s (PK05) but i receive info that is still used in control cycles - PK371 error and a material number. 

 I did go to MM03 for the material - nothing, LPK4 and delete control cycles for the PSA, LS02N for storage bin, LS11 for supply area .

After all the above i went back to LPK4 , same error ....

In LS41 i still see overview pf control cycles for WM Production Supply (status Release order part). I`m out of ideas on how to get rid of the PSA`s . 

Thank you !

entry.title: Re: LMS: Due Date based on the completion date of another...
entry.content:
We have one ITEM B which needs to be assigned once ITEM A is completed 2 years ago.

This is TEST Certification which users should completes post 2 years of ITEM A Completion.

How we can manage to Auto assignement of ITEM B post 2 years of ITEM A Completion .

Also ITEM A is already assigned via one curriculum

entry.title: Voting Needed for SuccessFactors TIH Improvement Requests
entry.content:
Dear all,

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out to request your support in voting for two improvement requests related to SuccessFactors TIH & 360

  1. Selective Behavior Rating in 360 Feedback Form
    Vote Here
    The current configuration of the 360 Feedback Form in SuccessFactors requires all behaviors associated with a competency to be included in the rating process. This lack of flexibility can lead to irrelevant or excessive feedback, which may dilute the focus on critical behaviors that are most pertinent to an employee's development. If job codes or job profiles are not in use, there is no possibility to select the behaviours which should be available in a 360.

  2. Multi-Competency Behavior Assignment in Talent Intelligence Hub
    Vote Here
    Currently, the Talent Intelligence Hub in SuccessFactors restricts behaviors to a one-to-one association with competencies. This limitation hinders the ability to accurately reflect the multifaceted nature of competencies that often share common behaviors. As a result, organizations struggle to create a comprehensive and realistic competency framework that aligns with their strategic goals and employee development plans.

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: LDAP.js Error: LdapErr:DSID-0C060810
entry.content:
I am working on an SAP BTP CAP app that integrates with Active Directory using LDAP.js. The connection to the LDAP server works fine for most requests, but occasionally, we encounter the following error:

LdapErr: DSID-0C060810, comment: No other operations may be performed on the connection while a bind is outstanding., data 0, v3839

What we are doing:
1. We have an API endpoint that calls the ldap.getUserInfo() function.
2. The code ensures that operations like binding, searching, and unbinding are performed sequentially using a mutex to serialize the requests.

Code:
API endpoint:

```
const { Mutex } = require('async-mutex');
const mutex = new Mutex();

apicall.on('searchAD', async (req) => {
const release = await mutex.acquire();
try {
return await ldap.getUserInfo(req.data.username);
} catch (error) {
req.error({
code: 400,
message: `${error.message}`
});
} finally {
release();
}
});

```

searchAD function:

```
async function searchAD (attributesToRead) {
return callLdap(
LDAP_CONFIG.base,
LDAP_CONFIG.scope,
`(&(objectClass=user)(sAMAccountName=${attributesToRead}))`
)
.then() // processing
.catch(error => {
logger.error('Error fetching users Details');
throw error; // Re-throw the error to propagate it
});
}

```

callLdap function:

```
async function callLdap(base, scope, filter) {
try {
const client = await createLdapClient();
return await new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
const entries = [];
client.search(base, {
scope: scope,
filter: filter,
paged: false
}, async (err, res) => {
if (err) {
logger.error('Search error in searchLdap:', err);
await client.unbind();
reject(err);
}
res.on('searchEntry', (entry) => {
entries.push({
jsonData: JSON.stringify(entry.object)
});
});
res.on('error', async (err_1) => {
await client.unbind();
reject(err_1);
});
res.on('end', async (result) => {
await client.unbind();
resolve(entries);
});
res.on('close', async (result_1) => {
await client.unbind();
reject(new Error('Socket closed'));
});
});
});
} catch (error) {
throw error;
}
}

```

createLdapClient function:

```
const ldap = require('ldapjs'); // Version: "^2.3.3"
async function createLdapClient(options) {
const ldapClient = ldap.createClient({
url: ldapUrl,
tlsOptions: { ...tlsOptions, socket: info.socket }
});

return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
ldapClient.bind(options.bindUser, options.bindPass, (err) => {
if (err) {
ldapClient.unbind();
return reject(err);
}
logger.info('Bound to LDAP server');
});

ldapClient.on('connect', () => {
resolve(ldapClient); // Resolve when connection is successful
});

ldapClient.on('error', (err) => {
reject(err); // Reject on error
});
});
}

```
What we’ve tried:
- Mutex Implementation: We are using a mutex to ensure only one LDAP request is processed at a time. This includes connection establishment, search, and unbinding operations.
- Client Unbind: We ensure the LDAP client is properly unbound after each operation.

Problem:
Even with the mutex in place, the following error occurs intermittently:
`LdapErr: DSID-0C060810, comment: No other operations may be performed on the connection while a bind is outstanding., data 0, v3839
`

 

 

 

 

What we’ve tried:
- Mutex Implementation: We are using a mutex to ensure only one LDAP request is processed at a time. This includes connection establishment, search, and unbinding operations.
- Client Unbind: We ensure the LDAP client is properly unbound after each operation.

Problem:
Even with the mutex in place, the following error occurs intermittently:
`LdapErr: DSID-0C060810, comment: No other operations may be performed on the connection while a bind is outstanding., data 0, v3839
`
This error indicates that an operation is being attempted while the LDAP bind is still in progress, even though the mutex is supposed to ensure sequential execution.

Questions:
- What could be causing this intermittent error?
- Is there a potential issue with the LDAP.js connection handling, or is it related to how the mutex is implemented?
- How can we further ensure that the bind operation is completely finished before any subsequent operations are executed?

Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: How to assign multiple batches to one SFC in discrete...
entry.content:
Hi Koichi,

The following Order, Batch, SFC relationship can only be achieved in Order POD at the moment, see Executing Discrete Production Orders in Order POD within SAP Digital Manufacturing to learn how you can execute discrete production orders in Order POD.

Work Center / Operation Activity PODs will always report Goods Receipt to the planned batch in the production order header, at the moment.

Hope it helps! Br,
Manoel

entry.title: SAP ECTR Client Encyrption in locally stored files/documents
entry.content:
Hi,

I understand that the SAP ECTR client temporarily stores locally in the working directory of the client workstation a copy of the file/document locally in the client in the check-out and check-in process. 

We have a security requirement to encrypt files stored locally (at rest) on the client workstation, even though they are only temporarily stored.   

Does SAP have a method to implement encryption on the file at rest?  If there is none, is there a roadmap to to build this feature?

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: [SAC] Values ​​using the formula RESTRICT cannot be d...
entry.content: You can add a new VDT-Widget to the story and then simply use the Auto-Create feature and select the relevant accounts. This should also bring in your restricted account. More info on VDT creation is available here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f6189755175940f3a4e007c3d6b83ee5.html?q=VDT

entry.title: A/P Invoice
entry.content:
Hi

  Is it possible that if any a/p down payment of Vendor is pending then its amount should automatically get appeared in Total Down Payment column in A/p Invoice through FMS or any other way.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Please remove the targetMonth parameter from your data statement, it should be DATA([d/Measures] = "VB") only. The target is now already defined and set by your Memberset-Statement.

entry.title: Re: How to restrict employees from recording timesheet af...
entry.content: Hi @Volker_Ruof, thanks for the response, really appreciate the solution provided. Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could attach any document or reference material to aid the configuration of this case.

entry.title: Re: Custom Handling unit label printing using PPF actions in EWM
entry.content:
Could you please share how to raise an error message from BADI /SCWM/EX_PRNT_PDF_HU, which can set the error flag to X, so the messages get recorded in the PPF log, which will help the user to understand the issue is from BADI custom logic?

Function Module:  /SCWM/EXECUTE_PPF_HU_PDF

entry.title: Re: LSMW - Create sales order
entry.content:
Hi, May I ask you how did you solve this issue?

Thanks in Advance

entry.title: Re: Parameters in data action
entry.content: Finally worked, thanks very much, and thanks for your patience 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Business Content MM
entry.content: Thank you....

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Business Content MM
entry.content: Thanl you...

entry.title: Re: Restrict Business Users from Deleting Contacts becaus...
entry.content:
Is it an option to tell the users that they must not delete contacts button in the contacts app, and offer an alternative method for deletions?

We have segmentation models for the contact deletions. The model determines a Live Target Group*, and then there are some daily Admin Jobs running. The first job is "remove marketing area from contacts" which will remove one marketing area from contacts that were selected with that segmentation. The second job is "flag contacts for deletion by target group", which uses a live target group that selects only contacts that do not have ANY marketing area left. And then of course the actual "delete flagged contacts" job.

 

*The segmentation models that are to be used for the deletion selection must contain enough branches so the users can use the criteria they need. Usually in our case, they just use the branch "email address equals". And they enter the email addresses of contacts that they want to have deleted.

 

I hope this might help.

entry.title: Re: How to create a segmentation profile where contacts h...
entry.content:
Could you use Business Role restrictions instead?

If a user has restrictions on country and on marketing area, they would only see and be able to segment on those in the segmentation models.

entry.title: SAP BTP Destination not working - Northwind
entry.content: Northwind Destination was working fine but now it's not working in Fiori App BTP Destination

entry.title: Re: Software download problem from SAP Support portal!
entry.content: Facing this problem for 1 of our customer who have opted for Sap B1 for HANA, though direct download is still available in my own S-ID (company provided).

entry.title: Re: Performance Issues in SAP Analytics Cloud with SAP BW/4HANA live connection
entry.content:
Hi Thanasis,

When you say analytics stories in excel, you mean BEx queries running in AFO or SAC excel add-in and its taking upto 4 minutes to open?

 

Regards,

Chinky

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content: @Teaman just extend the length of your barcode window to the desired width and it should cover more space that way.

entry.title: Re: Software download problem from SAP Support portal!
entry.content: Facing this problem for 1 of our customer who have opted for Sap B1 for HANA, though direct download is still available in my own S-ID (company provided). -- Nabyendu

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: no, it will take over the old url, you don't have to change odata url in your ui.

entry.title: Re: Authorization problem with /SCWM/MON or not?
entry.content:
Hello,
I have found the solution. The user has a role in which the authorization object /SCWM/MO contained authorization fields with “#” instead of “*”. After changing “#” to “*” in the authorization fields, it worked. The user was still able to access the warehouse monitor because the authorization object was set correctly in another role.

Greetings

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion in Central Invoice Management
entry.content:
Hi Britt,

Since Nov 15 you can replicate the exchange rates from S/4 to CIM. I suppose the system is expecting that you do that when it refers to missing configuration. 

See the latest setup guide for the 4N6 scope item and refer to 10.4.1.1.6.6 Configure Distribution Model in SAP Master Data Orchestration for Exchange Rate.

Did you set up this replication?

 

Best,

Jeroen

entry.title: Accessing $skip/$top inside Odata Batch requests in CAP Nodejs
entry.content:
Hi community,

I'm trying to figure out the correct way to access the $skip and $top query parameters on a request that's inside a $batch request. The reason is, that I need to transform those parameters and pass the request on to a remote system.

this.on('READ', Contents, async (req: Request) => {
  ...
}

 

 

I tried req.query and req.http.req.query but both only return {}.

While debugging, I found that the following ways work but are undocumented, so I'm not sure if it's safe to use them.

console.log(req.req.query)   // {'$skip': '0', '$top': '20'}
console.log(req._.req.query) // {'$skip': '0', '$top': '20'}

Any recommendations?

entry.title: Confirme Dates with SAP DM
entry.content:
We are using production orders with Order PODs in SAP DM.

Currently we are only confirming the dates/times for "Start of Exectuion" and "Finsih Exectuion". See picture attached. These confirmations are set with the standard integration flow. Can we confirm the additonal times like "Finish Setup" and "Start Processing"? Is ist possible with the standard integrationf flows or do we need custom integration flows?

entry.title: How to extend the size of an Existing table using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content:
Subject: Extending the Size of an Existing Table with ABAP2XLSX

Body:

Hello everyone,

I'm working with ABAP2XLSX and need help extending the size of an existing table.

For example, I have a table with 5 columns and 2 rows, and I want to expand it to 20 rows. How can I achieve this?

Any suggestions or advice would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance!
